title: Nojiko Reveals Nami’s Past
scene: On pages 17–18, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. The flashback reaches Arlong’s arrival, his money demands, and Bellemere’s impossible choice.

dialogue.speaker: Bellemere
dialogue.text: So don't lay a finger on them, you hear?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Of course. That is, as long as you die quietly.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: deal with them appropriately but don't kill them..

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My first example to the others...!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
